# Pull Request Template 🐭✨

## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.  
Also, include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes #(issue_number)

---

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

---

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows the project style (PEP8, ESLint, Tailwind conventions)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have added comments where necessary
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective / my feature works
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass
- [ ] I have updated documentation if necessary

---

## Changes Made
- **Backend:**  
  - [ ] FastAPI endpoints  
  - [ ] LangChain agent / RAG integration  
  - [ ] Database models / migrations  

- **Frontend:**  
  - [ ] React components / pages  
  - [ ] API calls to FastAPI  
  - [ ] Styles / CSS  

---

## How Has This Been Tested?
Please describe the tests you ran to verify your changes.  
Provide instructions so we can reproduce.  

- [ ] Manual testing in frontend  
- [ ] Unit tests for backend services  
- [ ] Integration tests with LangChain agent  

---

## Screenshots / Logs (if applicable)
Add any screenshots or logs to help explain the changes.

---

## Notes / Additional Comments
Add any other context about the PR here, like known issues or TODOs.
